_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analysis and synthesis involves helping an organisation to adopt a wide range of analysis and synthesis techniques, and to continually assure, improve and innovate their practices to generate clear and valuable findings.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.501), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.458).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.636). Shared vocabulary: [findings]. DDaT-only terms [adopt, analysis, assure, clear, continually, generate] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, approaches, engineering, methods, novel, operationalize] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.853, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 32-word DDaT element and 14-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Analysis and synthesis involves helping an organisation to adopt a wide range of" and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.529 < STS 0.636 (gap -0.107). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [adopt, analysis, assure] and [applicable, approaches, engineering] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.4%. Shared tokens: [findings]. DDaT-only: [adopt, analysis, assure, clear, continually, generate]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, approaches, engineering, methods, novel, operationalize].
